word: G1610 - ἐκριζόω - ekrizóō - ek-rid-zo'-o - Pluck up by the root

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκριζόω

- Transliteration: Ekrizoo

- Phonetic: ek-rid-zo'-o

- Definition:

1. to root out, pluck up by the roots

- Origin: from G1537 and G4492

- TDNT entry: 22:32,0

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G4492; to uproot: - pluck up by the root root up.
